steps.name: user launches the application
user clicks on sign in link
user enters login credentials
user clicks login button
user should login successfully

elements.name: Verify that user is able to navigate to "Tree" page

steps.name: user is on the Home page
user clicks Get Started button under Tree section
user should be navigated to Tree page successfully
user is on the Tree page
user clicks on "Overview of Trees" section
user should be able to see the content of "Overview of Trees" section
user clicks on "Type of Trees" section
user should be able to see the content of "Type of Trees" section
user clicks on "terminologies"
user should be able to see the content of "terminologies"
user clicks on "Traversals-Illustration"
user should be able to see the content of "Traversals-Illustration"
user clicks on "Tree Traversals"
user should be able to see the content of "Tree Traversals"
user clicks on "Binary Trees"
user should be able to see the content of "Binary Trees"
user clicks on "Types of Binary Trees"
user should be able to see the content of "Types of Binary Trees"
user clicks on "Implementation in Python"
user should be able to see the content of "Implementation in Python"
user clicks on "Types of Binary Trees"
user should be able to see the content of "Types of Binary Trees"
user clicks on "Binary Tree Traversals"
user should be able to see the content of "Binary Tree Traversals"
user clicks on "Implementation of Binary Trees"
user should be able to see the content of "Implementation of Binary Trees"
user clicks on "Applications of Binary trees"
user should be able to see the content of "Applications of Binary trees"
user clicks on "Binary Search Trees"
user should be able to see the content of "Binary Search Trees"
user clicks on "Implementation of Binary Trees"
user should be able to see the content of "Implementation of Binary Trees"
user clicks on "Implementation Of BST"
user should be able to see the content of "Implementation Of BST"
user clicks on "Practice Questions" section
user should be able to see the content of "Practice Questions" section

elements.name: Verify that user is able to navigate to "Try Here>>>" page

steps.name: The user is in the "Overview of Trees" page
user clicks on "Try Here>>>" button in "Overview of Trees" section
user should be navigated to "Try Editor" page successfully

elements.name: Verify that user is able to enter valid Java code in Text Box

steps.name: The user is in the "Try Editor" page
user enters valid Java code in Text Box and clicks on "Run" button
user should be able to see the output of the code in the output section

elements.name: Verify that user is getting alert by entering wrong syntax in text area and click on "Run" button

steps.name: user enters invalid Java code in Text Box and clicks on "Run" button
The user should be able to see Alert Message "Syntax Error"

elements.name: Verify that user is getting alert by entering random alphanumeric characters in text area and click on "Run" button

steps.name: user enters random alphanumeric characters in Text Box and clicks on "Run" button
The user should be able to see Alert Message "Not Defined"

elements.name: Verify that user is getting alert by clicking on "Run" button leaving text area blank

steps.name: user clicks on "Run" button leaving text area blank
The user should be able to see Alert Message for blank text area
